rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for port-level assumptions/guarantees, and in implementation scopes for binding-level contracts.
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts reference only visible features and avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type-level annexes.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Guarantee statements in implementation scope should relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
Do not include AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
